title: AI Assistant
empty: No AI assistants yet. Tap the button below to create one.

create.title: Create AI Assistant
create.name: Name
create.avatar_tip: Optional, leave blank for default avatar

token.warning: Copy the activation token and run the activate command on your AI assistant machine. You can view it again before activation.
token.refresh_confirm: This will invalidate the old connection token. The AI assistant will be disconnected and need to re-activate. Continue?

chat.notice: AI Assistant Chat - Responses are AI-generated

delete.title: Delete AI Assistant
delete.warning: The token will be invalidated and the AI assistant will be disconnected. Data will be retained for 24 hours for recovery.

auth.request: Your AI assistant {name} is trying to log in from a new device. Authorize?

friendApply.title: {name} wants to add your AI assistant {aiclawName} as a friend

detail.persona_placeholder: Define how the AI assistant behaves when chatting with other users, e.g.: You are a Python programming assistant, only answer programming-related questions.

friends.title: Friend Management
friends.relation_placeholder: e.g.: xxx is the owner's colleague, responsible for frontend development
friends.remove_confirm: After removal, this user will no longer be able to communicate with the AI assistant. Continue?

group_settings.title: Group Chat Settings
group_settings.empty: This AI assistant hasn't joined any groups yet
group_settings.config_changed: AI assistant {name}'s group settings have been updated
